value:
Thanks for reaching out, and I appreciate you sharing that detail. I want to make sure I understand the issue fully—when you drag an image onto a canvas, the center snap feature isn't triggering like it used to, is that right? 

Could you let me know which version of the software you're currently using? That'll help me track down whether this is a recent change or something specific to your setup. In the meantime, if you're able to share a quick screenshot or screen recording of what you're seeing, that would be really helpful for me to diagnose this properly.
